2567	// TestExecuteBeadGateBlocksLanding verifies that execute-bead preserves the
2568	// result instead of merging when a required gate fails.
2569	// Wired by ddx-14c0e790 (interactive execute-bead gate eval).
2570	//
2571	// Migrated off fakeExecuteBeadGit / fakeAgentRunner per concerns.md §testing
2572	// ("no mocks, period"; "never mock the thing you are testing"). Exercises the
2573	// real ExecuteBead → LandBeadResult → Land pipeline against an isolated real
2574	// git repo, with the script harness driving an actual commit via a per-attempt
2575	// directive file. Parent: ddx-d9df348d.
2576	func TestExecuteBeadGateBlocksLanding(t *testing.T) {
2577		workDir := t.TempDir()
2578	
2579		scrubEnv := func() []string {
2580			parent := os.Environ()
2581			env := make([]string, 0, len(parent))
2582			for _, kv := range parent {
2583				if strings.HasPrefix(kv, "GIT_") {
2584					continue
2585				}
2586				env = append(env, kv)
2587			}
2588			return env
2589		}
2590		runGit := func(args ...string) string {
2591			t.Helper()
2592			cmd := exec.Command("git", args...)
2593			cmd.Dir = workDir
2594			cmd.Env = scrubEnv()
2595			out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
2596			require.NoError(t, err, "git %v: %s", args, string(out))
2597			return strings.TrimSpace(string(out))
2598		}
2599	
2600		runGit("init", "-b", "main")
2601		runGit("config", "user.email", "test@ddx.test")
2602		runGit("config", "user.name", "DDx Test")
2603		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(workDir, "seed.txt"), []byte("seed\n"), 0o644))
2604		runGit("add", ".")
2605		runGit("commit", "-m", "chore: initial seed")
2606	
2607		seedExecuteBead(t, workDir, &bead.Bead{
2608			ID:        "gate-bead-fail",
2609			Title:     "Bead with failing gate",
2610			Status:    bead.StatusOpen,
2611			IssueType: bead.DefaultType,
2612			Extra:     map[string]any{"spec-id": "FEAT-GATE-TEST"},
2613		})
2614		// Gate docs must be committed so the real worker worktree (created at
2615		// baseSHA) sees them; the fake git path copied them in-process, but real
2616		// git only materializes tracked content.
2617		seedGateDocs(t, workDir, []string{"false"})
2618		runGit("add", ".ddx/beads.jsonl", "docs")
2619		runGit("commit", "-m", "chore: seed bead and gate docs")
2620		baseSHA := runGit("rev-parse", "HEAD")
2621	
2622		// Directive file drives the script harness to make one real commit in the
2623		// worker worktree — replaces fakeAgentRunner's canned Result struct.
2624		directivePath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "directives.txt")
2625		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(directivePath, []byte(
2626			"create-file out.txt content\n"+
2627				"commit feat: add out\n",
2628		), 0o644))
2629	
2630		// Real runner + real git ops: no overrides that fake the thing under test.
2631		f := NewCommandFactory(workDir)
2632		f.AgentRunnerOverride = agent.NewRunner(agent.Config{})
2633	
2634		res := runExecuteBead(t, f, nil, "gate-bead-fail",
2635			"--from", baseSHA,
2636			"--harness", "script", "--model", directivePath)
2637	
2638		assert.Equal(t, "preserved", res.Outcome, "failing required gate must preserve")
2639		require.Len(t, res.GateResults, 1)
2640		assert.Equal(t, "fail", res.GateResults[0].Status)
2641		assert.NotEmpty(t, res.PreserveRef, "failed-gate landing must preserve under refs/ddx/iterations")
2642	}

2644	// TestExecuteBeadNoGatesWhenNoChanges verifies that gates are not evaluated
2645	// when the agent produces no changes (resultRev == baseRev).
2646	func TestExecuteBeadNoGatesWhenNoChanges(t *testing.T) {
2647		git := &fakeExecuteBeadGit{
2648			mainHeadRev: "aaaa1111",
2649			wtHeadRev:   "aaaa1111", // same rev = no changes
2650		}
2651		runner := &fakeAgentRunner{result: &agent.Result{ExitCode: 0, Harness: "mock"}}
2652		f := newExecuteBeadFactory(t, git, runner)
2653	
2654		seedExecuteBead(t, f.WorkingDir, &bead.Bead{
2655			ID:        "gate-bead-nochange",
2656			Title:     "Bead with gate but no changes",
2657			Status:    bead.StatusOpen,
2658			IssueType: bead.DefaultType,
2659			Extra:     map[string]any{"spec-id": "FEAT-GATE-TEST"},
2660		})
2661		seedGateDocs(t, f.WorkingDir, []string{"false"})
2662	
2663		res := runExecuteBead(t, f, git, "gate-bead-nochange")
2664	
2665		assert.Equal(t, "no-changes", res.Outcome)
2666		assert.Empty(t, res.GateResults, "gates must not run when agent made no changes")
2667	}

2669	// TestExecuteBeadEmbeddedAgentStateRedirected verifies that when execute-bead
2670	// invokes the embedded-agent harness, its session/telemetry runtime state is
2671	// redirected into a DDx-owned directory inside the execution bundle instead
2672	// of being written at the worktree root. Regression guard for ddx-cba2dc64.
2673	func TestExecuteBeadEmbeddedAgentStateRedirected(t *testing.T) {
2674		git := &fakeExecuteBeadGit{
2675			mainHeadRev: "aaaa1111cafe",
2676			wtHeadRev:   "bbbb2222beef",
2677		}
2678	
2679		// Snapshot of wtPath root contents captured during Run so the assertion
2680		// can run before ExecuteBead removes the worktree on return.
2681		var wtPathDuringRun string
2682		var wtRootBefore []string
2683		var wtRootAfter []string
2684		var sessionLogDirSeen string
2685		simulatedSessionFile := "agent-embedded-session.jsonl"
2686	
2687		runner := &fakeAgentRunner{
2688			result: &agent.Result{ExitCode: 0, Harness: "agent"},
2689			sideEffect: func(opts agent.RunOptions) error {
2690				wtPathDuringRun = opts.WorkDir
2691				sessionLogDirSeen = opts.SessionLogDir
2692	
2693				// Capture worktree root listing before simulating writes.
2694				entries, err := os.ReadDir(opts.WorkDir)
2695				if err != nil {
2696					return err
2697				}
2698				for _, e := range entries {
2699					wtRootBefore = append(wtRootBefore, e.Name())
2700				}
2701	
2702				// Simulate the embedded-agent harness writing runtime state.
2703				// It MUST land in opts.SessionLogDir, not opts.WorkDir. If the
2704				// execute-bead wiring is broken and SessionLogDir is empty or the
2705				// worktree root, this write will land at the worktree root and
2706				// the post-check below will catch it.
2707				if opts.SessionLogDir == "" {
2708					return fmt.Errorf("embedded agent runner received empty SessionLogDir; runtime state would land at worktree root")
2709				}
2710				if err := os.MkdirAll(opts.SessionLogDir, 0o755); err != nil {
2711					return err
2712				}
2713				if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(opts.SessionLogDir, simulatedSessionFile), []byte(`{"event":"started"}`+"\n"), 0o644); err != nil {
2714					return err
2715				}
2716	
2717				// Capture worktree root listing after simulated writes.
2718				entries, err = os.ReadDir(opts.WorkDir)
2719				if err != nil {
2720					return err
2721				}
2722				for _, e := range entries {
2723					wtRootAfter = append(wtRootAfter, e.Name())
2724				}
2725				return nil
2726			},
2727		}
2728		f := newExecuteBeadFactory(t, git, runner)
2729	
2730		res := runExecuteBead(t, f, git, "my-bead", "--harness", "agent")
2731		require.Equal(t, "merged", res.Outcome, "execute-bead should succeed for this test")
2732	
2733		// The runner must have received a SessionLogDir override.
2734		require.NotEmpty(t, sessionLogDirSeen, "execute-bead must pass a SessionLogDir to the embedded harness")
2735	
2736		// The override must point inside the tracked execution bundle, not at
2737		// the worktree root.
2738		require.NotEmpty(t, res.ExecutionDir, "execute-bead must record an execution bundle dir")
2739		bundleAbs := filepath.Join(f.WorkingDir, filepath.FromSlash(res.ExecutionDir))
2740		absLog, err := filepath.Abs(sessionLogDirSeen)
2741		require.NoError(t, err)
2742		absBundle, err := filepath.Abs(bundleAbs)
2743		require.NoError(t, err)
2744		assert.Truef(t, strings.HasPrefix(absLog, absBundle+string(filepath.Separator)),
2745			"SessionLogDir (%s) must be inside the execution bundle (%s)", absLog, absBundle)
2746		assert.Equal(t, "embedded", filepath.Base(absLog),
2747			"SessionLogDir must be the bundle's embedded/ subdirectory")
2748	
2749		// The worktree root must not gain any files during the run.
2750		require.NotEmpty(t, wtPathDuringRun)
2751		assert.Equal(t, wtRootBefore, wtRootAfter,
2752			"worktree root entries must not change while the embedded harness runs (before=%v after=%v)",
2753			wtRootBefore, wtRootAfter)
2754		assert.NotContains(t, wtRootAfter, simulatedSessionFile,
2755			"simulated embedded session file must not land at the worktree root")
2756		assert.NotContains(t, wtRootAfter, ".agent-session.json",
2757			"embedded agent must not write .agent-session.json at the worktree root")
2758	
2759		// The simulated session file must exist at the redirected location.
2760		assert.FileExists(t, filepath.Join(sessionLogDirSeen, simulatedSessionFile))
2761	}

2803		_ = runExecuteBead(t, f, git, "xml-bead")

2805		require.NotEmpty(t, runner.last.PromptFile)

2473	// seedGateDocs writes a governing spec doc and a required execution gate doc
2474	// into workDir/docs/ so they are copied into worktrees by fakeExecuteBeadGit.
2475	func seedGateDocs(t *testing.T, workDir string, gateCommand []string) {
2476		t.Helper()
2477		docsDir := filepath.Join(workDir, "docs")
2478		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(docsDir, 0o755))
2479	
2480		specDoc := "---\nddx:\n  id: FEAT-GATE-TEST\n---\n# Spec: Gate Test\n"
2481		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(docsDir, "spec-gate-test.md"), []byte(specDoc), 0o644))
2482	
2483		var cmdYAML string
2484		for _, part := range gateCommand {
2485			cmdYAML += fmt.Sprintf("      - \"%s\"\n", part)
2486		}
2487		gateDoc := fmt.Sprintf("---\nddx:\n  id: EXEC-GATE-TEST\n  depends_on:\n    - FEAT-GATE-TEST\n  execution:\n    kind: command\n    required: true\n    command:\n%s---\n# Gate\n", cmdYAML)
2488		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(docsDir, "exec-gate-test.md"), []byte(gateDoc), 0o644))
2489	}

164	// LandBeadResult is the parent-side orchestrator. It receives a completed worker
165	// result and decides whether to merge, preserve, or report no-changes. All
166	// Merge, UpdateRef, gate evaluation, and preserve-ref management live here.
167	// The worker (ExecuteBead) must not call any of these operations.
168	//
169	// Outcome rules:
170	//   - ResultRev == BaseRev → "no-changes" (agent made no commits)
171	//   - ExitCode != 0 with commits → "preserved" (agent failed but left output)
172	//   - Gate failed → "preserved"
173	//   - NoMerge → "preserved"
174	//   - Default → attempt merge; on conflict → "preserved"
175	func LandBeadResult(projectRoot string, res *ExecuteBeadResult, gitOps OrchestratorGitOps, opts BeadLandingOptions) (*BeadLandingResult, error) {
176		landing := &BeadLandingResult{}
177	
178		// Agent failed with no commits: report as error (not no-changes).
179		// Prefer res.Reason (e.g. HeadRev failure set by worker) over res.Error
180		// (agent error) so the primary context failure is surfaced as the reason.
181		if res.ExitCode != 0 && res.ResultRev == res.BaseRev {
182			landing.Outcome = "error"
183			switch {
184			case res.Reason != "":
185				landing.Reason = res.Reason
186			case res.Error != "":
187				landing.Reason = res.Error
188			default:
189				landing.Reason = "agent execution failed"
190			}
191			return landing, nil
192		}
193	
194		// No changes from the worker: nothing to land.
195		if res.ResultRev == res.BaseRev {
196			landing.Outcome = "no-changes"
197			if res.NoChangesRationale != "" {
198				landing.Reason = res.NoChangesRationale
199			} else {
200				landing.Reason = "agent made no commits"
201			}
202			return landing, nil
203		}
204	
205		// Agent failed but produced commits: preserve without attempting merge.
206		if res.ExitCode != 0 {
207			ref := PreserveRef(res.BeadID, res.BaseRev)
208			if err := gitOps.UpdateRef(projectRoot, ref, res.ResultRev); err != nil {
209				return nil, fmt.Errorf("preserving result ref: %w", err)
210			}
211			landing.Outcome = "preserved"
212			landing.PreserveRef = ref
213			landing.Reason = "agent execution failed"
214			return landing, nil
215		}
216	
217		// Evaluate required gates when a worktree path and governing IDs are
218		// provided. EvaluateRequiredGatesForResult is the canonical helper —
219		// shared with upstream callers that want gate eval before submitting
220		// through the coordinator. It mutates res.GateResults / RequiredExecSummary
221		// / RatchetEvidence / RatchetSummary / ChecksFile in place; we mirror the
222		// outputs onto landing so ApplyLandingToResult can copy them back later
223		// without losing the existing landing.* contract.
224		anyGateFailed, anyRatchetFailed, gateErr := EvaluateRequiredGatesForResult(
225			opts.WtPath, opts.GovernIDs, res, projectRoot,
226			opts.ChecksArtifactPath, opts.ChecksArtifactRel,
227		)
228		if gateErr != nil {
229			return nil, gateErr
230		}
231		gateResults := res.GateResults
232		landing.GateResults = gateResults
233		landing.RequiredExecSummary = res.RequiredExecSummary
234		landing.RatchetEvidence = res.RatchetEvidence
235		landing.RatchetSummary = res.RatchetSummary
236		landing.ChecksFile = res.ChecksFile
237	
238		// Gate failed: preserve instead of merging. Ratchet misses get a
239		// dedicated reason so status/failure_mode classifiers can distinguish
240		// them from generic command failures.
241		if anyGateFailed {
242			ref := PreserveRef(res.BeadID, res.BaseRev)
243			if err := gitOps.UpdateRef(projectRoot, ref, res.ResultRev); err != nil {
244				return nil, fmt.Errorf("preserving result ref: %w", err)
245			}
246			landing.Outcome = "preserved"
247			landing.PreserveRef = ref
248			if anyRatchetFailed {
249				landing.Reason = RatchetPreserveReason
250			} else {
251				landing.Reason = "post-run checks failed"
252			}
253			return landing, nil
254		}
255	
256		// --no-merge: preserve unconditionally.
257		if opts.NoMerge {
258			ref := PreserveRef(res.BeadID, res.BaseRev)
259			if err := gitOps.UpdateRef(projectRoot, ref, res.ResultRev); err != nil {
260				return nil, fmt.Errorf("preserving result ref: %w", err)
261			}
262			landing.Outcome = "preserved"
263			landing.PreserveRef = ref
264			landing.Reason = "--no-merge specified"
265			return landing, nil
266		}
267	
268		// Default: land the worker's commits on the target branch. When a
269		// LandingAdvancer is provided (server coordinator / --local coordinator)
270		// it runs the fetch → (ff or merge) → push sequence serialized per
271		// projectRoot. When no advancer is provided, LandBeadResult falls back
272		// to preserving the result under refs/ddx/iterations/ — the interactive
273		// single-bead CLI path, which intentionally does NOT auto-advance the
274		// target branch (the operator moves the ref themselves).
275		if opts.LandingAdvancer != nil {
276			land, landErr := opts.LandingAdvancer(res)
277			if landErr != nil {
278				return nil, fmt.Errorf("land advancer: %w", landErr)
279			}
280			switch land.Status {
281			case "landed":
282				landing.Outcome = "merged"
283				if land.Merged {
284					landing.Reason = "merged onto current tip"
285				}
286				if land.NewTip != "" {
287					res.ResultRev = land.NewTip
288				}
289				if land.PushFailed {
290					landing.Reason = "landed locally; push failed: " + land.PushError
291				}
292			case "preserved":
293				landing.Outcome = "preserved"
294				landing.PreserveRef = land.PreserveRef
295				landing.Reason = land.Reason
296			case "no-changes":
297				landing.Outcome = "no-changes"
298				landing.Reason = land.Reason
299			default:
